name: Chicken Baked with Orange-Spiced Harissa Sauc
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except chicken to make a smooth sauce. Thin with orange juice if needed.
2. Separate the skin from the chicken breast carefully, taking care not to cut the skin.
3. Place some of the sauce between the breast and skin. Cover the chicken with the remainder of the sauce.
4. Marinate the chicken in the refrigerator for 3-4 hours.
5. Bake the chicken at 350°F (175°C) for two hours, basting frequently with sauce. If the chicken browns too quickly, cover it with aluminum foil.
6. Heat index: 4
